title: Battle lines drawn over Christchurch's $421M fiber network
content: Christchurch's debt-laden city council is again likely to vote on whether to sell off New Zealand's Enable Network, a profitable broadband asset.

BSNL and Airtel top nPerf's India broadband rankings
content: BSNL comes first in nPerf's ranking of fixed broadband performance in India despite its lower subscriber share, while Airtel dominates mobile and 5G.
